title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.268 - Complaints, grounds, review
text:
197.268.  Complaints, grounds, review. — The department shall receive, process, and dispose of complaints against a hospice.  Any person may complain of any suspected abuse, neglect, or misappropriation by a hospice or employee of a hospice.  The department shall make rules providing for the processing of such complaints.
(L. 1992 H.B. 899 § 10)
